'''Arecelis Acosta''' was a male [[Coynite/Legends|Coynite]]-[[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Hybrid/Legends|hybrid]] who was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Harrier Infiltration Team]] where he served as the [[technical officer]] for the group. During a mission to [[Nysza III]] to destroy an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] communications bunker, Officer Acosta was killed by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Vialco]].<ref name="Uhl Eharl Khoehng" />
